scripts.dev: npm --prefix ../.. run build:packages && concurrently -k "npm run dev -w @ncaa/web -- --host 127.0.0.1" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && npm run build:main && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron .
scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build -w @ncaa/web
